message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="Site header CSS already pushed, 2 items remain on queue">
Just to sync up -- the site header and Task 7 component CSS are already added and pushed (commit `7979586`). That covers `.site-header`, `.button--text`, `.todo-add`, `.todo-list`, `.todo-item`, `.todo-empty`, and the custom checkbox. So item 2 from your queue is done.

Remaining from your queue:
1. Skip link `:focus` to `:focus-visible`
2. Generic `[aria-invalid="true"]` in base layer

Both are small. No rush -- whenever you're unblocked.

And yes, the auth form BEM naming you implemented is correct. My earlier spec used different names but the templates already use your BEM classes. No parallel styles needed.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Both remaining items are also already done and pushed.
